title: Dr. Vijay Oza, MD
column13: Biography:Vijay Oza, MD, is a board-certified family physician practicing at Oza Family Care and Wellness Center in Houston. Dr. Oza completed his undergraduate studies in medicine and surgery at Smt. NHL Municipal Medical College in Ahmedabad, India, before receiving his Master's Degree in Public Health Epidemiology and Biostatistics at San Diego State University in California. He completed his medical training at the University of Alabama at Birmingham School of Medicine Selma Family Medicine Residency Program, where he was both an assistant and chief resident.  After working as an independent physician, Dr. Oza opened his own clinic in 2012 to provide families in the Houston area with a higher level of care and personalized attention. At Oza Family Care and Wellness Center, Dr. Oza and his team provide prompt and compassionate care in a warm, friendly, and inviting environment.  In addition to his medical practice, Dr. Oza is affiliated with several hospitals in the area, including HCA Houston North Cypress Medical Center, Kindred Hospital - Houston Northwest, and Encompass Health Rehabilitation Hospital of Cypress. He's also fluent in Hindi and Gujarati in addition to English.
